description_long: This bistro features a compact, rectangular building with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist facade. The front area is defined by a covered outdoor seating section with several round tables and chairs, protected by a large white awning. The entrance is flanked by potted greenery and a prominent signboard above the door, while the side and rear of the building are bordered by well-maintained hedges and additional landscaping. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray tone with a contrasting dark red trim along the roofline, and the windows are simple and rectangular. The paved patio extends around the building, providing ample space for foot traffic and outdoor dining. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on comfort and accessibility for patrons.
description: A modern bistro with a flat roof, outdoor seating under a large awning, and a clean, minimalist facade accented by greenery and a prominent signboard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, outdoor seating area under a white awning, and the bistro's signboard above the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, the outdoor seating area, and the hedge-lined landscaping along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, extensive hedge landscaping, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and front, with the entrance, signboard, and both the hedge and outdoor seating area visible.
